findings.text: Bank statement covers 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026 for account holder Anfal Abdalla Musa Elbushra.
Total outgoings £19,057.59 and total deposits £19,057.88 over the statement period.
Extracted transactions from 13–27 April 2026 include Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing, M&S, Greggs, Klarna, and personal transfers.
Only ~6k of ~27k tokens were excerpted; full transaction list for Sep 2025–Apr 2026 is incomplete.

proposed_artifacts.content: Full transaction list extracted from NAP-SRC-0012 covering 01/09/2025–28/04/2026. Includes all debits, credits, descriptions, dates, and running balances. Note: OCR confidence 0.85; verify amounts and descriptions against original PDF.
proposed_artifacts.title: Full transaction list from NAP-SRC-0012

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-extract the full text of NAP-SRC-0012 without truncation. Parse all transactions from 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026 into a structured table (date, description, amount, balance). Flag any OCR uncertainties.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract complete transaction history from NAP-SRC-0012

redaction_flags.description: Account holder name and address visible; may need redaction before sharing.
Sort code, account number, and IBAN visible; sensitive financial data.

risk_flags.description: Extracted text is incomplete; relying on partial data may misrepresent financial activity.
Personal identifiable information (name, address, account number) present in the statement.

summary: Extracted partial transaction list from Monzo bank statement NAP-SRC-0012 (01/09/2025–28/04/2026). The extracted text covers only 13–27 April 2026; the full statement is ~27k tokens but only ~6k chars were excerpted. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the complete transaction history.

uncertainties.description: Full transaction list for Sep 2025–mid Apr 2026 is missing due to excerpt truncation.
OCR/extraction confidence is 0.85; some amounts or descriptions may be misread.
No evidence of rent or accommodation-related payments in the excerpted portion.
